objective: come up with all the ways that you would take this project, as a .01% top researcher in this new field of compression science; build a whole regimen of testing and documenting and explore this idea until you've proven its viability and made the program work; read Telomere Whitepaper V2.md; identify things that could be tweaked and use subagents in brainstorming sessions; organize a dispatching-parallel-agents research team that will test, explore, research, and prove the viability of this idea and program as it runs

requirements.requirement: Read and anchor the project against Telomere Whitepaper V2.
requirements.finding: The canonical docs separate implemented architecture, experimental v2/indexed work, and theoretical whitepaper claims.
requirements.remaining_proof_gap: Keep future whitepaper-derived claims tied to generated evidence and compatibility boundaries.

requirements.requirement: Make the program work as a deterministic lossless codec and CLI.
requirements.finding: Goal audit status is architecture-implemented; research-viable; not production-proven; current implementation covers v1, experimental v2, indexed/streaming engines, and decoder checks.
requirements.remaining_proof_gap: Passing gates prove current behavior, not generalized compression viability.

requirements.requirement: Build a whole regimen of testing, documentation, and generated results.
requirements.finding: Generated results format 2 and doc lint tie claims to checked artifacts and release gates.
requirements.remaining_proof_gap: Continue regenerating ledgers whenever new experimental evidence is added.

requirements.requirement: Prove the mechanism can produce negative delta under controlled conditions.
requirements.finding: Viability ledger records planted short-seed and planted-span negative delta evidence.
requirements.remaining_proof_gap: Planted data proves mechanism, not prevalence in natural corpora.

requirements.requirement: Explore tweaks and frontiers like transforms, depth, sidecars, GPU, and recursion.
requirements.finding: Frontier status is no_ungated_compute_ready; 0 ready lanes, 2 gated lanes, and 3 blocked-by-evidence lanes.
requirements.remaining_proof_gap: No ready ungated compute remains; reopen requires generated evidence triggers.

requirements.finding: Team protocol defines 6 briefs across 6 work packages with 16 forbidden actions.
requirements.remaining_proof_gap: Current posture is maintenance-only; future agents need generated reopen triggers before running compute-heavy lanes.

requirements.requirement: Make research state visible enough for future operators and UI work.
requirements.finding: UI smoke promotion is True with 24 required artifacts and 22 required cards.
requirements.remaining_proof_gap: Static smoke is not a desktop browser run; keep Tauri tests green after UI changes.

requirements.requirement: Prove generalized viability on non-planted or natural corpora.
requirements.finding: Natural-corpus matrix status is not_natural_corpus_proven; 8 natural-corpus gates are blocked-by-evidence, held-out selected-span rows are 0, and the best non-planted forecast is 828.0 GiB per expected exact hit.
requirements.remaining_proof_gap: Need repeatable non-planted selected spans or negative delta with controls intact.

requirements.requirement: Prove production readiness, compatibility guarantees, and acceleration value.
requirements.finding: Production matrix status is not_production_ready; 3 production gates are blocked-by-evidence and 1 gates require fresh release-candidate runtime proof.
requirements.remaining_proof_gap: Need supported production-format claims, real acceleration evidence, and release-ready compatibility policy.

requirements.requirement: Only mark the active goal complete when every explicit requirement is proven.
requirements.finding: Completion boundary is goal_not_complete_until_natural_corpus_or_supported_production_claims_are_proven with 27 unresolved evidence gates.
requirements.remaining_proof_gap: Keep the active goal open until natural-corpus or supported production claims are proven.

completion_rule: Do not mark the active goal complete until every requirement is complete or proved, production_proven is true, and unresolved_evidence_gates is zero.
